designNotes.aesthetic: A warm desert workshop composition pairs sandstone paper tones with rust red, near black mechanical lines, large editorial serif type, and precise component inspired diagrams.
designNotes.signatureMove: The service area is built as a working wheel selector. Three labeled spokes control the adjacent service panel on wide screens, while smaller screens preserve the full wheel and show every service in a clear list below it.
designNotes.rationale: The oversized chainring and service wheel make bicycle mechanics central to the layout without relying on unavailable photography. Firm borders, practical language, and restrained colors support a dependable neighborhood shop character.
